summary: Tested P0 Backend Validation for Driver Availability System. All critical tests PASSED: (1) Unavailable driver cannot accept food orders - returns 403, (2) Unavailable driver cannot accept product orders - returns 403, (3) Unavailable driver cannot accept batch orders - returns 403, (4) Driver with active orders cannot set unavailable - returns 400, (5) Driver can always set available. Frontend UI correctly shows unavailable state with clear warning message.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend validation in delivery.py correctly checks is_available before allowing order acceptance
✅ Backend validation prevents driver from setting unavailable when they have active food orders (out_for_delivery)
✅ Backend validation prevents driver from setting unavailable when they have active product orders (out_for_delivery, on_the_way, picked_up)
✅ Error messages are in Arabic and clearly explain why action is blocked
✅ Frontend correctly hides orders when driver is unavailable and shows warning message
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing driver account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver availability validation is fully implemented and working. Key endpoints: GET/PUT /api/delivery/availability, POST /api/food/orders/delivery/{order_id}/accept, POST /api/delivery/orders/{order_id}/accept. Frontend shows 'أنت غير متاح حالياً' message when driver is unavailable. Theme toggle cycles through auto/light/dark modes.

P0_backend_unavailable_driver_food_order.behavior: Returns 403 with message 'يجب تعيين حالتك إلى متاح قبل قبول الطلبات'

P0_backend_active_orders_block_unavailab.behavior: Returns 400 with message 'لا يمكنك تعيين نفسك غير متاح - لديك X طلب نشط يجب تسليمه أولاً'

frontend_unavailable_message.details: Shows red banner with 'أنت غير متاح حالياً' and description text

frontend_availability_toggle.details: Header button shows '○ مغلق' or '● متاح' with proper styling

frontend_dashboard_tabs.details: طلبات متاحة (0), طلباتي (0), 💰 الأرباح all visible

frontend_order_type_filters.details: الكل, 📦 منتجات, 🍔 طعام filter buttons working

screenshots: .screenshots/driver_dashboard_avail.png - Dashboard showing unavailable state with warning
.screenshots/04_theme_test.png - After theme toggle to light mode
